title: Ubiquiti USW-Enterprise-24-PoE - UniFi Switch Enterprise 24 PoE
description: UniFi Switch Enterprise 24 PoE is a reliable manageable 2.5-Gigabit L3 Switch with a switching capacity of 124 Gbps , (12) 2.5-Gigabit LAN ports, additional (12) Gigabit LAN ports, and two SFP+ (10 Gbps) slots. All Ethernet ports support 802.3af/at PoE-Out with an output power of 30 W/port and a total PoE budget of 400 W . In addition to the standard equipment, the switch also has a 1.3" touch screen for providing information about the system, temperature, port statistics, PoE power supply and… (12) 100M/1G/2.5G ports - 802.3af/at PoE+ support (30W/port) (12) 10/100M/1G ports - 802.3af/at PoE+ support (30W/port) (2) 1/10G SFP+ ports 400W Total PoE capacity 1.3" touch display Backup power via SmartPower RPS connector Supported in UniFi Controller from version 5.14.12 USW-Enterprise-24-PoE does not have web management but is managed centrally by UniFi Controller with support for the UniFi mobile application and offers an extensive set of advanced switching protocols and L2 functions, including operating mode (switching, mirroring or aggregation) per port. UniFi Network Controller and mobile applications allow administrators to configure and monitor virtually all graphical user interface functions from anywhere This generation of switches supports redundant power supply via a special connector to the UniFi SmartPower unit in the event of a failure of the primary power supply at the switch Device Power cord 19" rack mounts
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (12) 100/1000/2500Mbps + (12) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 1G/10Gbps Other features Touchscreen Power Power type Mains power (230V), UniFi SmartPower RPS PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at Redundant power supply Yes PoE Out ports 24 PoE budget [W] 400 Max. power consumption [W] 550 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Fans No Chassis design Metal Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 325 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 124 MAC address table 16000 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 92,2
